title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for prediction markets on real-world events after years of regulatory battles and a lawsuit against government oversight. The company achieved a $22 billion valuation and scaled to millions of customers and billions in trading volume within four weeks after regulatory approval.
